task_completion.description: The Subsurface application is open with the dive log loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface GUI is visible on the screen, displaying a list of dives.

task_completion.description: The deepest dive (Dive #90) is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dive number 90 (or the dive with Max Depth 46.48m) is highlighted or selected in the dive list.

task_completion.description: The deepest dive is tagged with 'Record-Deep'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'Record-Deep' is visible in the Tags input field or dive details section while Dive #90 is selected.

task_completion.description: The longest dive (Dive #348) is located and selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dive number 348 (or the dive with Duration 119:55) is highlighted or selected in the dive list.

task_completion.description: The longest dive is tagged with 'Record-Long'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'Record-Long' is visible in the Tags input field or dive details section while Dive #348 is selected.
The agent clicks the 'Save' button/icon, uses the Ctrl+S shortcut, or the window title no longer shows an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Subsurface GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Subsurface application interface being used to sort, select, and tag dives.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to modify the dive log file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) are shown editing the raw XML/SSRF file to insert the tags.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run scripts (e.g., Python, sed, awk) that automatically find the records or modify the .ssrf file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The deepest dive is Dive Number 90 with a Max Depth of 46.48m. It must be tagged exactly 'Record-Deep'. The longest dive is Dive Number 348 with a Duration of 119:55. It must be tagged exactly 'Record-Long'. The logbook file is located at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf.
